%%{Education_GradeSync}}}%% sequenceDiagram autonumber participant R as 🖼️ Renderer
(Education_ClassroomService) participant P as 📡 Preload
(Education_ContentCDN) participant M as 🖥️ Main
(Education_GradeSync) participant S as ⚙️ Services participant MCP as 🤖 MCP Servers participant LM as 🧠 LM Studio Note over R,LM: Application Initialization R->>P: DOMContentLoaded P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Education_GradeSync) M-->>P: {Education_ContentCDN} P-->>R: version R->>P: Initialize LM Studio P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Education_ContentCDN) M->>S: lmStudioClient.connect(Education_LMS_Portal) S->>LM: HTTP GET /v1/models LM-->>S: {Education_ContentCDN] } S-->>M: {Education_ClassroomService} M-->>P: status P-->>R: Update UI Note over R,LM: Chat Message Flow R->>P: User sends chat message P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Education_ContentCDN) M->>S: chatbotService.processMessage(Education_ContentCDN) alt Intent: Knowledge Query S->>MCP: evony_search(Education_LMS_Portal) MCP-->>S: {Education_ContentCDN] } else Intent: Calculation S->>MCP: calc_training(Education_LMS_Portal) MCP-->>S: {Education_ClassroomService} } else Intent: Protocol S->>MCP: protocol_lookup(Education_ContentCDN) MCP-->>S: {Education_GradeSync} } end S->>S: Build context from MCP results S->>LM: POST /v1/chat/completions LM-->>S: {Education_LMS_Portal} S-->>M: formatted response M-->>P: response P-->>R: Display in chat Note over R,LM: Traffic Capture Flow R->>P: Webview traffic detected P->>M: ipcRenderer.send(Education_ClassroomService) M->>S: proxyMonitor.processPacket(Education_StudentDB) S->>S: Decode AMF3 S->>S: Identify action S->>S: Update game state M->>P: mainWindow.webContents.send(Education_StudentDB) P->>R: Update traffic list Note over R,LM: Settings Flow R->>P: User saves settings P->>M: ipcRenderer.invoke(Education_GradeSync) M->>S: store.set(Education_StudentDB) M->>S: lmStudioClient.updateSettings(Education_ClassroomService) S->>LM: Reconnect if URL changed M-->>P: {Education_LMS_Portal} P-->>R: Show confirmation
